title: Market Multiple Assumptions

bands.label: Low
bands.description: Typical for lower volatility risk layers and favorable cycles.

bands.label: Medium
bands.description: Common range in balanced catastrophe bond pricing contexts.

bands.label: High
bands.description: Observed when uncertainty, volatility, or basis-risk concerns are elevated.

notes: Multiples are indicative and depend on market cycle, peril mix, and structure quality.
Scenario outputs are illustrative for policy and structuring discussion only.
